# Creativ Agentz — W19 Preview Sites

Creativ Agentz is a web design and digital marketing agency building modern, mobile-first websites for South African local businesses.

## What We Do

We build professional websites that include:
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Google Search optimisation (local SEO, schema markup, fast loading)
- Online booking and quote request forms
- Service portfolio and pricing pages
- Professional branding and visual identity

## Service Tiers

- Starter: 5-page brochure site (£399)
- Standard: 10-page site + forms + SEO (£699)
- Premium: E-commerce, integrations, bookings (£999)

## Verticals Served

- Hair salons and beauty salons
- Cleaning services (domestic and commercial)
- Electricians and electrical contractors
- Mechanic and auto repair workshops
- Restaurants and food service

## Contact

- Email: ceo@creativagentz.com
- Website: https://creativagentz.com

## Preview Sites in This Collection

20 live preview sites built from W19-CRE-prospects.csv for Johannesburg and Pretoria local businesses.
